value: Refunds are issued to the original form of payment.
Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the phone is received and inspected at our facility.
To initiate a return, log into your account and print a shipping label. Factory reset the phone before shipping.
Free return shipping for all mobile phones.
Mobile phones must be returned within 15 days of delivery.
Phones must be in their original, sealed packaging to avoid a restocking fee.
Opened phones incur a 15% restocking fee.
Phones with physical damage or liquid damage cannot be returned.
Online orders can be returned at brand stores only
Refurbished or clearance phones are final sale and cannot be returned.
Warranties do NOT cover accidental damage (drops, cracked screens) or liquid damage unless an extended protection plan was purchased.
Extended warranty (AppleCare+, Samsung Care+) must be purchased within 60 days of the original purchase date.
All new mobile phones come with a standard 1-year manufacturer warranty covering hardware defects.
Address can be changed before order is in processing. Cannot change once the order status is changed to Shipped or Delivered
